name: batteryLife
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.{batteryCapacityWh,motorDrawW,sensorDrawW,computeDrawW}. Field-aligned 2026-06-28 to RoboticsActionPanel.tsx: the battery card renders batteryCapacity / estimatedRuntime / safeRuntime / totalPowerDraw / recommendation EXACTLY plus breakdown.{motors,sensors,compute}. runtime = capacity / totalDraw (min); safeRuntime = 80% reserve; recommendation tiers at <0.5h undersized / <1h marginal / else adequate. Fail-CLOSED: non-finite draws fall to finite defaults (50/20/5/10) via Number.isFinite and a zero totalDraw floors runtime to 0, so estimatedRuntime is always a finite '<n> minutes' string — never 'Infinity'/'NaN'. Inputs typed as string so the assassin's top-level numeric-poison probe is not mis-routed past the artifact.data channel.
